USC Norris Cancer Hospital
prices.

📍 Los Angeles, CA Keck Medicine of USC

Cash-pay and insurance prices for 37 procedures at USC Norris Cancer Hospital, pulled from the federally-mandated machine-readable file the hospital is required to publish. Cash-pay range across these procedures: $10 to $18,988.

Procedure prices.

Open the comparison →

About this data.

The prices above are pulled directly from USC Norris Cancer Hospital's machine-readable file (MRF), required under the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50). We download the file, parse the rows for our shoppable CPT set, and publish the dollar amounts as the hospital published them. No surveys, no estimates.

Cash-pay rates are what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan; pick a payer in the comparison tool to see plan-specific numbers.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
